title: Student
description: Student identity record, keyed by lifetime Master PEA ID. Demographic fields use last-write-wins (low-stakes only); marks/money are NOT here. White paper §8, §11.

master_pea_id.description: Lifetime cross-school identity, e.g. PEA-2026-00124. Issued by the cloud.

photo_ref.description: Reference to the enrolment photo (ID card, visual register, documents). Personal data of a minor — consent-gated.

demographics_revision.description: LWW marker for demographic edits; cloud restamps authoritative time at sync.
